k3_system_recap: >>> RECAP: The hero reached Eldenrath and gained allies - Vex the blacksmith and Aria, a young warrior. Bandits led by Garak threatened the village. After training and preparation, the bandit assault was repelled, Garak defeated. At the campfire, the hero experienced a first memory flash: A castle in flames and a voice - 'You should not have returned.'
k3_aria_scan_forest: >>> Area scanned. Dark forest, east of Eldenrath. High monster activity detected. Caution advised.
k3_protag_enter: The forest looks... different than I expected. Thicker. Darker.
k3_aria_warning: I don't like this. The trees here absorb the light. My sensors are struggling to scan ahead.
k3_protag_sounds: Do you hear that? Those sounds are coming from everywhere at once.
k3_aria_analysis: Acoustic anomaly. The trees scatter sound in a hundred directions. Perfect hunting ground for predators.
k3_system_darkness: >>> WARNING: Visibility below 40%. Recommendation: Prepare for ambush.
k3_kael_intro: Well, well, well! Someone else foolish enough to stumble into this forest?
k3_protag_who: Who are you? And why are you sneaking up on me?
k3_kael_explain: Kael. Treasure hunter, occasional thief, survival artist. And I'm not sneaking - I was here first. There's an old mine up ahead. Full of forgotten treasures... and probably monsters too.
k3_aria_distrust: Careful. He moves like someone used to going unnoticed. I don't trust him.
k3_kael_proposal: How about this - we share the path. Four eyes see more than two, and I know a few hidden trails around here. Or do you want to go solo through the Shadow Wolf Express?
k3_choice_trust: Agreed. But if you stab me in the back...
k3_choice_distrust: No. I'll go my own way.
k3_protag_trust: Alright, Kael. We go side by side. But don't try anything stupid.
k3_kael_happy: Ha! You won't regret it. Probably. Come on, this way - I know a shortcut.
k3_kael_shortcut: See those markings on the trees? Old hunter signs. Most people miss them completely.
k3_aria_reluctant: I'm keeping an eye on him. If he makes even one suspicious move...
k3_protag_alone: Thanks, but no. I'd rather rely on myself.
k3_kael_shrug: Your loss, hero. See you at the mine then - if you make it that far.
k3_aria_agree: Smart choice. We know nothing about him.
k3_protag_ruins: What's that? Between the trees... old walls?
k3_system_ruins: >>> Ancient structure detected. Age: 800+ years. Residual magic signature present. Classification: unknown.
k3_aria_old_magic: These runes... the magic here is ancient. Far older than anything I've seen before. Something powerful once existed here.
k3_system_night: >>> Night mode activated. Campfire established. Perimeter scan: no immediate threats.
k3_protag_thinking: I can't sleep. Too many questions. Where do I really come from? Why can't I remember anything?
k3_aria_stars: The stars are so clear here... As if the forest kept them safe for us. Get some rest. I'll keep watch.
k3_system_nightmare: >>> WARNING: Anomalous neural activity detected. Memory fragment being accessed... Data severely corrupted.
k3_protag_nightmare: Where... where am I? This darkness... I know it. I've been here before.
k3_nihilus_echo: You remember... how touching. But memories can be deceiving, little hero.
k3_system_choice_warning: >>> Memory fragment unstable. Deeper access possible, but risk to neural integrity elevated.
k3_choice_wake_up: Wake up. This is just a dream.
k3_choice_dig_deeper: Dig deeper. I need to know what happened.
k3_protag_wake: Hah... hah... What a nightmare. Nihilus... I saw him. Or a memory of him.
k3_aria_calm: You're safe. It was just a dream. Your pulse is normalizing. Take a deep breath.
k3_protag_dig: No... don't wake up. I need to see this. Show me more!
k3_system_fragment: >>> WARNING: Neural overload. Fragment being decompressed...
k3_aria_fragment_face: I see... my own face? But older. More determined. And behind me... a blinding light.
k3_nihilus_fragment: You want the truth? The truth is an abyss from which there is no return.
k3_system_hp_loss: >>> Memory fragment forced. Neural integrity compromised. HP loss detected. Fragment saved.
k3_protag_cave: Up ahead - the mine entrance. It's getting tight.
k3_system_boss_ahead: >>> Massive energy signature inside the cave. Earth-based elemental opponent. Weakness: fire.
k3_aria_ready: Whatever's waiting in there - we're ready. Side by side.
k3_protag_crystal: What is that? This crystal... it glows from within. It pulses as if it's alive.
k3_system_crystal: >>> Unknown artifact detected. Energy signature: 94% match with... ERROR. Data unavailable. Classification impossible.
k3_aria_confused: This doesn't make sense. My databases don't recognize this energy form. But... somehow it feels familiar.
k3_aria_glitch: W-what... my system just... I had a glitch. For a moment I saw something. Another life. Another... me.
k3_consq_trust_kael: See? This hollow right here - you would've missed it completely without me. There was a pouch of coins inside. Shared loot, as promised!
k3_consq_trust_aria: >>> Item received: 30 Gold. Kael's local knowledge is impressive. Trust level increasing... marginally.
k3_consq_distrust_aria: >>> Alternative path calculated. 800-meter detour, but safer. Without unknown variables, we have full control.
k3_consq_distrust_protag: Better alone and safe than with a stranger I'd have to watch my back around.
k3_consq_wake_aria: You were talking in your sleep. A name... 'Nihilus.' Whoever that is - he scares you. He scares me too.
k3_consq_wake_protag: This Nihilus... he's waiting for me. I can feel it. But right now I'm awake, and I'm not alone.
k3_consq_dig_protag: My head is pounding... but I saw something. A battlefield. Thousands dead. And I was standing in the middle of it all - holding a sword of pure light.
k3_consq_dig_aria: >>> Memory fragment saved to long-term storage. Data partially readable. You were someone important - that much is certain.
k3_system_healer_trace: >>> Unusual: Residual natural healing magic signature detected in the ruins. Someone with rare life force was here recently. Signature: wandering, not settled. Recommendation: Keep in mind.
